other_observers: CFO NE Trip Participants :David Waltman ,Debra Spam , Diana and Michael King , Frances Sperl , Janet Ormes , John Colvin , Jo Prentice , Nic Korte , Peggy Wait .; Yes , I was the original finder
specific_location: Red Lion SWA , along CR 65 about 150 yards North of intersection with SR 168 .
description: Plegadis species with a dark eye and bluish lores with a small white border around face. Legs uniformly grayish ,no hint of red coloration on legs. Bill coloration difficult to judge as overcast and to some extent bird was backlight .Behaviors: Bird was an individual feeding at edge of marsh , flew off maybe 50 yards and proceeded to preen and rest before commencing feeding again but lower part of body now no longer visible because in long grass. No other ibis were present for comparison.Call: NonePlumage: Adult
photographer: Photographer: John Drummond, John Drummond, John Drummond, John Drummond, John Drummond
